subject: Human Resources
title: Employee Relations
description: A quick win: understand Employee Relations.

hook.text: Two employees refuse to work together. Productivity drops. Their teams take sides. HR steps in.

buildup.text: Employee relations manages the relationship between employer and employees—conflicts, grievances, and morale.

discovery.text: It includes handling complaints, mediating disputes, enforcing policies, and fostering a positive workplace.

twist.text: Most workplace conflicts escalate because they're ignored too long. Early intervention saves careers.

climax.text: Strong employee relations reduce turnover, lawsuits, and toxic culture—the costliest HR problems.

punchline.text: Healthy relationships at work don't happen by accident.

quiz.question: What does employee relations primarily manage?
options: The relationship between employer and employees
